---
format:
  html:
    lightbox: true
    mermaid-format: png     # force static image
    embed-resources: false  # important for GitHub Pages
---

```{mermaid}
%%| mermaid-format: png
%%| fig-cap: "Caption here"
%%| 
sequenceDiagram
participant Brian
participant Chirag
participant Dave
participant Gary
participant Jake
participant Jason
participant Jeff
participant John-o
participant K&G
participant Kyle
participant Strauss
participant Travis
Brian->>Brian:  
Chirag->>Chirag:  
Dave->>Dave:  
Jason->>Jason:  
John-o->>John-o:  
K&G->>K&G:  
rect rgb(191, 223, 255)
Strauss->>Travis: 🚀 Rnd 1⃣ (2026)
end
rect rgb(191, 223, 255)
Travis->>Kyle: 🚀 Rnd 1⃣ (2026)
end
Note right of Kyle: lesser of Strauss/Travis first rounder
rect rgb(191, 223, 255)
Jake->>Travis: 🚀 Rnd 1⃣ (2026)
end
rect rgb(191, 223, 255)
Gary->>Kyle: 🚀 Rnd 1⃣ (2026)
end
rect rgb(191, 223, 255)
Jake->>Kyle: ⭐ Rnd 2⃣ (2026)
end
rect rgb(191, 223, 255)
Strauss->>Jeff: ⭐ Rnd 2⃣ (2026)
end
rect rgb(191, 223, 255)
Travis->>Jake: ⛔ Rnd 3⃣ (2026)
end
rect rgb(191, 223, 255)
Kyle->>Gary: ✨ Rnd 4⃣ (2026)
end
rect rgb(191, 223, 255)
Kyle->>Gary: 🚾 Rnd 5⃣ (2026)
end
rect rgb(200, 150, 255)
Strauss->>Jeff: 🚀 Rnd 1⃣ (2027) 
end
rect rgb(200, 150, 255)
Travis->>Kyle: ⭐ Rnd 2⃣ (2027)
end
rect rgb(200, 150, 255)
Gary->>Kyle: ⭐ Rnd 2⃣ (2027)
end
rect rgb(200, 150, 255)
Kyle->>Travis: ⛔ Rnd 3⃣ (2027)
end
```

[Download full-size PNG](phantazee_files/figure-html/mermaid-figure-1.png){download="PhantazeeTrades" .btn .btn-primary}
